topics.title: Artie Lange's Sports Betting Wins
topics.summary: The studio features Artie Lange discussing his recent gambling successes and the mechanics of teaser bets before he decides whether to risk his winnings on an upcoming game.

topics.title: Media Misinterpretation of Satellite Radio Comments
topics.summary: The studio addresses how news outlets took quotes from an interview out of context to portray the host as ungrateful for his satellite radio audience.

topics.title: Sports Betting and Office Decor
topics.summary: The studio discusses sports betting odds for an upcoming basketball game, the market dominance of Sirius over XM radio, and the oversized dimensions of a framed portrait in the host's office.

topics.title: David Lee Roth and CBS Radio Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses David Lee Roth’s struggle with CBS management over his on-air style and the irony of being told to emulate Howard Stern's persona.

topics.title: David Lee Roth's Show Overhaul
topics.summary: The studio discusses David Lee Roth’s struggle with a forced format change at CBS Radio, the difficulties of replacing Howard Stern, and a news report regarding an incident involving a stalker.

topics.title: Confrontation with an Aggressive Man
topics.summary: The studio recounts a harrowing encounter on a Saturday night when a man became aggressive and eventually spat in the face of a woman during a walk from a restaurant.

topics.title: Assault on Howard Stern and Beth Ostrowski
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent physical confrontation involving an aggressive man who threatened Howard Stern and his girlfriend while they were walking in Manhattan.

topics.title: Cowboy Cupid and Mexican Marriage Services
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion with Ivan Thompson, known as Cowboy Cupid, who offers services to match American men with Mexican women for marriage.

topics.title: Mexican Matchmaking and Film Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Ivan Thompson, a man who facilitates marriages between American men and Mexican women and promotes his film, Cowboy Del Amor.

topics.title: Celebrity Divorce News and Guest Interview
topics.summary: The studio discusses the divorce of several celebrities, including a former Mets player's wife and actor Matt LeBlanc, before transitioning to an interview with comedian Sandra Bernhardt regarding her career and television appearances.

topics.title: Celebrity Experiences and Career Reflections
topics.summary: The studio features a candid conversation about past film roles in Budapest, personal relationships, upcoming comedy shows, and various anecdotes regarding the entertainment industry.

topics.title: Sandra Bernhardt One-Woman Show
topics.summary: The studio promotes Sandra Bernhardt's upcoming one-woman show, "Everything Bad and Beautiful," at the Darryl Roth Theater in Manhattan.

topics.title: Staff Conflict and News Segment Previews
topics.summary: The studio features a heated argument between producers regarding professional respect and production roles before transitioning into news segments covering local crimes, celebrity appearances, and upcoming show topics.

topics.title: Media News and Studio Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including adult film content, upcoming events, listener feedback on recent segments, an apology from a guest regarding his behavior during a roast, and the potential move of Katie Couric to CBS.

topics.title: Global Warming and Middle East Conflict
topics.summary: The show covers public perception of global warming, the release of a prisoner from Iraq, Iranian missile developments, and ongoing Senate debates regarding immigration measures.

topics.title: Celebrity Privacy and Media Coverage
topics.summary: The studio discusses the controversy surrounding Gawker.com's reporting on celebrity locations, the potential risks of stalking, and various entertainment news including film releases and award show highlights.
